text:
*What I Did*
. Scaffolded Laravel 11 backend in backend/ (PHP 8.2+, MySQL, Sanctum)
. Scaffolded React 19 + Vite frontend in frontend/
. Installed and configured Tailwind CSS v4, Axios, React Router
. Created GitHub Actions CI workflow (backend + frontend jobs)
. Updated README.md with full setup instructions
. Configured .env.example files for both backend and frontend
. PR merged: <https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/2>

*Tests Executed*
. php artisan test - 2 passed
. npm run build - built successfully
. /api/health endpoint - returned {"status":"ok"} 

*Files Changed*
. 76 files added across backend/ and frontend/
. .github/workflows/ci.yml updated with frontend job
. README.md rewritten with setup instructions

*What's Left*
. Nothing for Sprint 1 scope - all acceptance criteria met

*Needs Human Decision*
. None

text:
*What I Did*
- Multi-tenant orgs: Organization model, migration, global scope on tickets
- Auth: register, login, logout with Sanctum tokens
- Ticket CRUD: create, list (paginated), show, update, delete - all tenant-scoped
- Comments: public replies + internal notes on tickets
- Seeders + factories: orgs, users, tickets, comments
- Frontend: login/register pages with auth context
- Frontend: ticket dashboard with status filters + new ticket form
- Frontend: ticket detail with comments, status changes, internal notes
- Protected routes (redirect unauthenticated users)

*Tests Executed*
- php artisan test: 14 passed (35 assertions)
- npm run build: success (293KB JS bundle)
- CI: backend passed, frontend passed

*Files Changed*
- backend/app/Models: User (org relation + role), Organization, Ticket (tenant scope), Comment
- backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api: AuthController, TicketController, CommentController
- backend/routes/api.php: auth + ticket + comment routes
- backend/database/factories: OrganizationFactory, TicketFactory, CommentFactory
- backend/database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php
- backend/tests/Feature: AuthTest, TicketTest
- frontend/src/lib: api.js, auth.jsx
- frontend/src/pages: Login, Register, Dashboard, TicketDetail
- frontend/src/App.jsx: full router with protected/public routes

*What's Left*
- SLA policies (Sprint 3)
- Activity log (Sprint 3)

*Needs Human Decision*
- PR merge approval: <https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/4>

text:
*Sprint 3 Complete - Core Ticketing Engine*

*What I Did*
- Tag system: model with tenant scope, many-to-many pivot, TagController (full CRUD)
- Advanced search/filtering: subject+description search, multi-status, priority, assignee (incl unassigned), tag filter, sorting
- Assignment logic: assignee validated against org - cross-org returns 422
- Org members endpoint: GET /api/org/members for assignment dropdowns
- Frontend: advanced filter bar (status, priority, assignee, tag, search)
- Frontend: tag badges in list, inline tag editor on ticket detail
- Frontend: assignee dropdown + priority selector in sidebar
- Updated seeder: tags per org, attached to tickets

*Tests Executed*
- php artisan test: 30 passed (67 assertions)
- npm run build: success (300KB JS, 17KB CSS)
- CI: backend passed, frontend passed

*Acceptance Criteria*
- [x] Tickets strictly isolated by organization_id
- [x] CRUD fully functional
- [x] Search and filters return correct result sets
- [x] Agents can assign tickets to same-org members only
- [x] Tags persisted and displayed correctly
- [x] All tests pass, CI green

*PR:* <https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/5>
*Needs Human Decision:* PR merge approval

attachments.title: feat(sprint-4): ticket conversations, activity log, analytics dashboard by Udi2312 · Pull Request #6 · Udi2312/forge2-Udit

text.text:
*Conversations, Activity Log & Analytics Dashboard*

*PR:* <https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/6|#6 - merged>
*Tests:* 46 passed (110 assertions)
*CI:* ? Backend ? Frontend

*Backend Deliverables:*
. TicketMessage model + 	icket_messages migration - public replies + internal notes
. ActivityLog model + ctivity_logs migration - audit trail for all ticket events
. TicketMessageController - role-based visibility (customers can't see/post internal notes)
. ActivityLogController - chronological timeline endpoint
. DashboardController - tenant-scoped metrics (status/priority breakdown, avg resolution time, 14-day volume, agent performance)
. Activity logging auto-wired into TicketController (no duplicate logs)
. 3 new test suites: ConversationTest (6), ActivityLogTest (6), DashboardMetricsTest (4)
. API version bumped to 4.0.0

*Frontend Deliverables:*
. TicketDetail rewritten with tabbed UI (Conversation + Activity)
. Conversation thread: chronological messages, internal note toggle (role-gated)
. Activity timeline: visual audit trail with field change details
. New Insights page (/insights): metric cards, pie/bar/line charts, agent performance table
. Date range filter + 30s auto-polling
. Build: 703KB JS, 18KB CSS

text:
?? Sprint 5 COMPLETE: Quality, SLAs & Final Polish

*Backend:*
. SLA Policy Engine (per-org, per-priority response/resolution targets)
. Notification System (in-app alerts on ticket changes)
. SlaPolicyController (admin CRUD) + NotificationController
. Ticket::slaStatus() - on_track/warning/breached/met/none
. API v5.0.0

*Frontend:*
. NotificationBell component (bell icon, unread badge, dropdown, 30s poll)
. SLA badges on Dashboard + TicketDetail with deadline display
. Loading spinners, empty states, consistent styling

*Tests:* 64 passed (139 assertions) - was 46, +18 new
*Build:* 707KB JS, 20KB CSS

*Docs:* User Manual + Technical Documentation

PR: <https://github.com/Udi2312/forge2-Udit/pull/7>
